overview: Amp Player 1 (ASO-V3) is a next-generation modular audio processing app that simulates a high-end multi-amp car audio system with the Helix DSP as a unified Virtual Digital Analog Simulation amp. Features a split-thread architecture for uninterrupted playback, 25 on-device smart chips with learning behaviors, Thunder Battery characteristics power chain, Bluetooth speaker scanning, and a full rule book enforcement system.
features: Single unified Helix DSP amp with Virtual Digital Analog Simulation
Split-thread architecture: Thread A (isolated playback) + Thread B (25 smart chips in Web Worker)
1,720,000W characteristics power via Thunder Battery chain (688 runs)
Bluetooth Speaker Scanner Chip — reads watts and ohms from connected speaker
Zero Stacking Policy Chip — independent rAF monitor, kills violations instantly
Superior HD Monitor built inside every bass slider, distortion slider, and Limiter
Gain Kill Switch — cuts all gains to 0.0 simultaneously
Real backend save system — all settings persist across sessions
Volume range exactly 1-100, all bass band sliders shortened
